svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.5.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.6.1 Safari/537.36" version="29.5.1"> <diagram id="service-catalog-data-pipeline" name="Service Catalog Data Pipeline"> <mxGraphModel dx="-564" dy="-172" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1200" pageHeight="700" background="#FFFFFF" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="Service Catalog データ収集パイプライン" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="500" x="350" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;fillColor=#FFF2CC;strokeColor=#D6B656;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;shadow=1;" value="Service Catalog Server
(Rust / axum + tonic)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="260" x="440" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;fillColor=#DAE8FC;strokeColor=#6C8EBF;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;" value="Health Collector
(Background Task)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="40" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="21" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;fillColor=#E1D5E7;strokeColor=#9673A6;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" value="External Services
/healthz endpoints" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="40" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="22" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=10;fillColor=#F8CECC;strokeColor=#B85450;fontSize=10;" value="service_health
(PostgreSQL)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="130" x="80" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="30" edge="1" parent="1" source="20" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#6C8EBF;dashed=1;" target="21" value="polling (60s interval)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="31" edge="1" parent="1" source="20" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#B85450;" target="22" value="status update"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="32" edge="1" parent="1" source="10" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#D6B656;" target="20"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="40" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;fillColor=#DAE8FC;strokeColor=#6C8EBF;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;" value="Event Publisher
(Kafka Producer)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="470" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="41" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=25;rounded=1;fillColor=#D5E8D4;strokeColor=#82B366;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Kafka Topics" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="200" x="790" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="42" parent="41" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#82B366;fontSize=9;" value="service.registered" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="170" x="15" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="43" parent="41" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#82B366;fontSize=9;" value="service.updated" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="170" x="15" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="44" parent="41" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#82B366;fontSize=9;" value="service.deleted" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="170" x="15" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="50" edge="1" parent="1" source="40" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#82B366;" target="41" value="publish events"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="51" edge="1" parent="1" source="10" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#D6B656;" target="40" value="on CRUD"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="60" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;fillColor=#DAE8FC;strokeColor=#6C8EBF;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;" value="Scorecard Evaluator
(Periodic Task)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="840" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="61" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=10;fillColor=#F8CECC;strokeColor=#B85450;fontSize=10;" value="service_scorecards
(PostgreSQL)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="860" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="70" edge="1" parent="1" source="10" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#D6B656;" target="60"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="71" edge="1" parent="1" source="60" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#B85450;" target="61" value="periodic evaluation"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="80" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=10;fillColor=#F8CECC;strokeColor=#B85450;fontSize=10;" value="PostgreSQL
(services, teams, etc.)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="470" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="81" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=10;fillColor=#F8CECC;strokeColor=#B85450;fontSize=10;" value="Redis Cache" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="470" y="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="90" edge="1" parent="1" source="10" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#B85450;" target="80" value="read/write"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="91" edge="1" parent="1" source="10" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#B85450;" target="81" value="cache"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="100" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=0;fillColor=#DAE8FC;strokeColor=#6C8EBF;fontSize=10;" value="API Clients
(React UI / CLI / External)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="260" x="440" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="101" edge="1" parent="1" source="100" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#6C8EBF;" target="10" value="REST + gRPC"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
